scripts.build:dev: cd apps/mobile && eas build --profile development --platform android
scripts.build:preview: cd apps/mobile && eas build --profile preview --platform android
scripts.build:prod: cd apps/mobile && eas build --profile production --platform android
scripts.submit:prod: cd apps/mobile && eas submit --profile production --platform android
scripts.ota:preview: cd apps/mobile && eas update --branch preview --environment preview --message
scripts.ota:prod: cd apps/mobile && eas update --branch production --environment production --message
scripts.web:export: cd apps/mobile && npx expo export --platform web
scripts.supabase:types: npx supabase gen types typescript --local > packages/api/src/database.types.ts
